issue: EventBus publishes loop_cycle_business_ops with no handlers registered
root_cause: PersistentLoop._publish_event() publishes loop_cycle_{name} to EventBus singleton. EventRegistry.register_defaults() never registers a handler for loop_cycle_business_ops.
fix_applied: Option A — registered diagnostic handler _handle_loop_cycle that records cycle metadata without triggering execution. Added loop_cycle_business_ops to EVENT_TYPES frozenset and to register_defaults() mappings.
